Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to appoint a receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Impose Personal Liability On Third Party, Lakeside Lanes Llc, For Judgment; Request For Attorney'S Fees (Ccp 701.020)
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for an order to impose personal liability on a third party is granted. No opposition has been filed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
